title: Daily Summary - 2026-03-23
content:
## Accomplishments

- **OnePlus 6T Node Setup**: Documented Mobian (Debian-based) OpenClaw node configuration
  - IP: 192.168.12.200, OpenClaw v2026.3.13
  - Gateway configured for local-only mode (loopback binding)
- **Market Monitoring**: Huginn market scan operational (BTC $70.7k, XRP $1.43)
- **NVIDIA Driver Validation**: Confirmed 570.211.01 stable, flagged 595.xx series as buggy
- **Agent Health Checks**: All 6 subagents confirmed healthy (21:00 UTC check)

## Key Decisions

- **XRP Bot Risk Management**: Bot correctly hit daily loss limit and ceased trading
- **VPN Issue Identified**: UAE VPN connection needed for Pionex access (currently failing)

## Bot Activity

### XRP Paper Trading Bot
**Status**: Active (paper mode), daily loss limit reached

**Trades Executed**:
| Side | Size | Entry | Exit | PnL | Reason |
|------|------|-------|------|-----|--------|
| LONG | 150.4 XRP | $1.4183 | $1.3937 | **+$26.08** | Trailing stop (1.5%) |
| SHORT | 183.7 XRP | $1.3717 | $1.4112 | **-$52.91** | Stop loss (2.0%) |

**Session Summary**:
- Net PnL: **-$26.83**
- Win Rate: 50% (1/2)
- Final Balance: 114.8 XRP (~$161.87)
- **Daily Loss Limit Reached**: Bot halted new positions after SHORT loss at 11:06 UTC

**Bot Issues**:
- VPN not connected to UAE (affects Pionex API access)
- Webhook service restarted twice (17:10, 18:24 UTC)

## Agent Work

### Heimdall Health Check (21:00 UTC)
All agents healthy:
- Huginn: 4.1s response time
- Tyr: 5.6s response time  
- Sindri: 6.1s response time
- Thor: 8.5s response time
- Njord: 13.9s response time
- Mimir: 4.2s response time

### Huginn Market Scan (23:05 UTC)
- BTC: $70,707.46 (+1.14% 24h, -5.37% 7d)
- XRP: $1.4283 (-1.28% 24h, -7.47% 7d)
- Volume: 1.3x average on both
- No significant opportunities detected

## Technical Notes

### Infrastructure
- Gateway mDNS/Bonjour re-advertising loop detected (warning status)
- The Hub dashboard running on :3000 (3 days uptime)
- OnePlus 6T node configured but requires VPN for external access

### Configuration Notes
- OnePlus 6T (fajita) running Mobian/Phosh
- OpenClaw config at `/home/mobian/.openclaw/`
- PATH fix required: `export PATH=/home/mobian/.npm-global/bin:$PATH`

## Next Steps

- [ ] Resolve VPN UAE connection issue for Pionex bot
- [ ] Investigate gateway mDNS loop warning
- [ ] Consider XRP bot strategy adjustments after daily loss limit hit
- [ ] Set up Tailscale on OnePlus 6T for remote access

---
